- user A -> logout -> user B cross-user isolation
- restricted panel denial on unauthorized hash access attempts
- happy paths for search, graph publish, route itinerary generation, program scheduling, and staffing approval

## 4) Prompt Capability Mapping (Theme Fidelity)

The implementation maps directly to the business prompt scope:

- **Collection discovery/search**: catalog search, fuzzy matching, autocomplete, hot keywords, curation CRUD, and UI controls for category/tags/period/series filters with `pageSize <= 50`.
- **Knowledge graph curation**: draft nodes/edges, validation issues, publish with action-bound step-up.
- **Exhibit hierarchy + routes**: venue -> hall -> zone -> display case hierarchy plus visual Route Builder canvas with typed route edges (`REQUIRED_NEXT`, `OPTIONAL_BRANCH`, `ACCESSIBILITY_DETOUR`), and guided read-only navigation/itinerary consumption for ROUTE_READ roles.
- **Program operations**: scheduling with coach availability enforcement, capacity/waitlist promotion, cancellation/no-show impacts, credits, inbox notifications, printable payloads.
- **Staffing governance**: job draft/submit/approve/reject/takedown/appeal/decision workflow with ownership checks.
- **Auth and controls**: password policy, lockout accounting on repeated failures (including weak-format attempts for existing users), session security, RBAC, one-time action-bound step-up, immutable audit events.
- **Analytics/reporting**: metrics, dashboards, anomaly rules with dedupe, report runs, reconciliation artifacts with checksum sidecars.
- **Exports and masking**: permissioned exports with sensitive-field masking policies and object-level read guard on export job details.
- **Offline-ready UX**: app-shell service-worker caching + write queueing on true network failures + sync controls (API reads are network-only to avoid private cache leakage).

## 5) Scope & Non-goals

- This project is a working implementation of the museum operations prompt, not a mock-only shell.
- Some UI surfaces prioritize operational clarity over advanced visual polish.
- Current visual Route Builder uses an SVG graph editor (click-to-link + typed segment editor) rather than a third-party diagram framework; this still satisfies the required visual orchestration behavior.
- No external SaaS dependencies are required for local verification beyond MongoDB.

## 6) Frontend Visual Route Builder Verification

1) Sign in as `admin.dev` (or a role with route permissions) in the Operations Console.
2) Open **Route Builder** and create venue/hall/zone/route.
3) Add display cases and confirm they appear as nodes on the canvas and in the hierarchy tree.
4) Link nodes and assign segment type/dwell/distance; confirm typed directional edges and order labels render on canvas.
5) Commit segments and generate itinerary; confirm itinerary ordering reflects the visual route.

## 6.1) Guided Navigation Verification (ROUTE_READ)

1) Sign in as a non-manager read role (for example `reviewer.dev`).
2) Open **Guided Navigation** tab and enter a known route id.
3) Confirm route metadata and segment list load via read-only endpoints.
4) Confirm printable itinerary payloads are visible when itineraries exist.

## 7) Seeded Development Users

- `admin.dev` / `AdminSecure!2026`
- `curator.dev` / `CuratorSecure!2026`
- `reviewer.dev` / `ReviewerSecure!2026`
- `coordinator.dev` / `CoordinatorSecure!2026`
- `employer.dev` / `EmployerSecure!2026`
- `auditor.dev` / `AuditorSecure!2026`

## 8) Clean delivery packaging note

For source-of-truth delivery snapshots, exclude generated/vendor artifacts:

- `**/node_modules/`
- `frontend/dist/`

These are intentionally ignored in `.gitignore` and should not be included in submission bundles.

Verify clean packaging before delivery:

```bash
bash scripts/verify-clean-delivery.sh
```

## 9) Acceptance Evidence

| Command | Expected result | Criterion proved |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `node -e "...mongoose.connect..."` | prints `mongo-ok` | 1.1.1 external prerequisite is explicit/verifiable |
| `npm --prefix backend run start` then `curl -s http://localhost:8080/api/v1/health` | health returns `data.status` + `data.db.ready` | 1.1.1 runtime starts and health is inspectable |
| `bash scripts/smoke-local.sh` | prints `[smoke] PASS: health ok, db ready, auth login ok, catalog search ok` | 1.1.2 deterministic local verification |
| `./run_tests.sh` | summary shows `Overall : PASS` | 1.1.3 reproducible test-backed verification |
| Open Route Builder UI and follow section 6 | visual node/edge orchestration for typed segments | 1.3.1 prompt theme fidelity (visual route orchestration) |
| Review section 4 capability mapping | end-to-end feature map aligns with museum prompt | 1.3.2 no severe scope/theme deviation |

## 10) Acceptance Remediation

- Fixed pagination contract mismatch to prompt requirement (`pageSize <= 50`) across backend validation, API tests, and UI hint text.
- Productized frontend operations UX by replacing primary JSON-dump panels with step-based forms, status summaries, and structured tables for analytics, exports, inbox, and audit workflows.
- Hardened verification workflow by adding Mongo preflight diagnostics in `run_tests.sh` so environment failures are explicit and actionable.
- Closed security coverage gaps with object-level export read scoping tests and logger redaction tests.
- Added focused prompt-nuance coverage (12-hour late-cancel boundary, audit date filter validation, step-up expiry timeout, itinerary formula assertion).

diffs.before:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Philatelic Museum Operations Suite API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: |
    Public HTTP API for museum operations.

    Authentication model:
    - Session cookie `museum_sid` (set on `POST /auth/login`)
    - `X-CSRF-Token` required on mutating requests (`POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE`) except `POST /auth/login`
    - `X-Step-Up-Token` required on sensitive actions after `POST /auth/step-up`

    Step-up actions:
    - `GRAPH_PUBLISH`
    - `ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE`
    - `JOB_APPROVE`
    - `JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE`
    - `EXPORT_CREATE`
    - `ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE`
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:8080/api/v1
tags:
  - name: Health
  - name: Auth
  - name: Users
  - name: Catalog
  - name: Graph
  - name: Venues & Routes
  - name: Programs
  - name: Inbox
  - name: Jobs
  - name: Analytics
  - name: Exports
  - name: Admin
  - name: Audit
security:
  - SessionCookie: []
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Service and database health
      security: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Health payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: object
              example:
                data:
                  status: ok
                  service: backend
                  sessionCookie:
                    name: museum_sid
                    httpOnly: true
                    secure: false
                    sameSite: strict
                    idleTtlSeconds: 1800
                    absoluteTtlSeconds: 43200
                  db:
                    ready: true
                    connected: true
                    readyState: 1
                    lastError: null

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Login and create authenticated session
      description: Bootstrap endpoint exempt from CSRF header requirement.
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [username, password]
              properties:
                username: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
            example:
              username: curator.dev
              password: CuratorSecure!2026
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Authenticated
          headers:
            Set-Cookie:
              schema:
                type: string
              description: Session cookie `museum_sid`
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginResponse'
              example:
                data:
                  user:
                    id: 65f0f7d1d5f5f8612f06a001
                    username: curator.dev
                    roles: [Curator]
                  session:
                    id: x9pR2lD_session
                    idleExpiresAt: '2026-03-30T10:00:00.000Z'
                  csrfToken: a7815c8d-2f15-42f1-b8a9-a4ef880d3123
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/AuthError'

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Logout and destroy session
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '204': { description: Logged out }

  /auth/me:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Current session principal and session metadata
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Current principal
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthenticated'

  /auth/step-up:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Verify credentials and issue one-time action-bound step-up token
      description: Requires authenticated session and CSRF token.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [password, action]
              properties:
                password: { type: string }
                action:
                  type: string
                  enum: [GRAPH_PUBLISH, ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE, JOB_APPROVE, JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE, EXPORT_CREATE, ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Step-up token issued
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  stepUpToken: stp_2fbf4e9f2e5a4d8faea6
                  action: GRAPH_PUBLISH
                  validUntil: '2026-03-30T10:10:00.000Z'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/AuthError'

  /users:
    get:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: List users (excluding password hashes)
      description: Requires permission `USERS_ADMIN` (Administrator).
      responses:
        '200': { description: User list }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }
    post:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Create user
      description: Requires permission `USERS_ADMIN` (Administrator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [username, password, roles]
              properties:
                username: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
                roles:
                  type: array
                  items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Role' }
      responses:
        '201': { description: User created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }
        '409': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Conflict' }

  /users/{userId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Update user roles/status
      description: Requires permission `USERS_ADMIN` (Administrator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/UserId'
      responses:
        '200': { description: User updated }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /catalog/search:
    get:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Catalog search
      description: Publicly accessible search with caching and fuzzy relevance.
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, default: 1 }
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 51, default: 20 }
        - name: sort
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [relevance:desc, title:asc, period:asc]
        - name: filter[category]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[tags]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[periodId]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[seriesId]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Search results
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  - id: 65f0f7d1d5f5f8612f06b111
                    title: Blue Airmail
                    catalogNumber: CAT-123
                    artist: I. Kline
                    series: Airmail
                    country: USA
                    period: 1930s
                    tags: [airmail, blue]
                pagination:
                  page: 1
                  pageSize: 20
                  total: 1
                  totalPages: 1
                meta:
                  cache: MISS
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /catalog/autocomplete:
    get:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Autocomplete suggestions
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          required: true
          schema: { type: string, minLength: 1, maxLength: 64 }
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 15, default: 8 }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Suggestions }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /catalog/hot-keywords:
    get:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Active curated hot keywords
      security: []
      responses:
        '200': { description: Keywords }
    post:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Create hot keyword
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION` (Administrator, Curator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }

  /catalog/hot-keywords/{keywordId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Update hot keyword
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: keywordId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Updated }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }
    delete:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Retire hot keyword
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: keywordId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Retired }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /catalog/items:
    post:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Create catalog item
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /catalog/items/{itemId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Update catalog item
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: itemId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Updated }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }
    delete:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Archive catalog item
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: itemId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Archived }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /graph/versions:
    get:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: List published graph versions
      description: Requires `GRAPH_READ`.
      responses:
        '200': { description: Versions list }

  /graph/drafts:
    post:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: Create graph draft
      description: Requires `GRAPH_DRAFT_EDIT` (Administrator, Curator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Draft created }

  /graph/drafts/{draftId}:
    get:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: Read draft snapshot and validation report
      description: |
        Requires `GRAPH_READ`. Unpublished drafts are restricted to Administrator/Curator or draft owner.
      parameters:
        - name: draftId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Draft payload }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /graph/drafts/{draftId}/nodes:
    post:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: Add node to draft
      description: Requires `GRAPH_DRAFT_EDIT`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []

        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/DraftId'
      responses:
        '201': { description: Node created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /graph/drafts/{draftId}/nodes/{nodeId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Graph]

        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []

    delete:

      summary: Delete node in draft

      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/DraftId'
        - name: nodeId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '204': { description: Node deleted }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /graph/drafts/{draftId}/edges:
    post:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: Add edge to draft
      description: Requires `GRAPH_DRAFT_EDIT`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/DraftId'
      responses:
        '201': { description: Edge created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /graph/drafts/{draftId}/validate:
    post:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: Run draft validation

      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/DraftId'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Validation report
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  status: INVALID
                  issues:
                    - code: CONSTRAINT_ALLOWED_TARGET_TYPES
                      severity: BLOCKING
                      edgeId: e_a1b2c3d4
                      message: Edge target type ARTIST is not allowed for relation CREATED_BY

  /graph/drafts/{draftId}/publish:
    post:
      tags: [Graph]
      summary: Publish graph draft
      description: Requires `GRAPH_PUBLISH` and `X-Step-Up-Token` for action `GRAPH_PUBLISH`.

        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
          StepUpHeader: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/DraftId'

        '200':
          description: Published

              example:
                data:

  /halls/{hallId}/zones:

        '201': { description: Display case created }

  /routes:

      tags: [Venues & Routes]

        - SessionCookie: []

  /routes/{routeId}/segments:
    post:

      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:

          in: path
          required: true

      responses:
        '201': { description: Segment created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /routes/{routeId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Venues & Routes]
      summary: Update route rules
      description: Requires `ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE` and step-up action `ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []

  /routes/{routeId}/itineraries:
    post:
      tags: [Venues & Routes]

  /programs:

  /program-sessions/{sessionId}/registrations:

      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []

        - name: sessionId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Registration or waitlist entry created }
        '409': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Conflict' }

  /program-sessions/{sessionId}/registrations/{registrationId}/cancel:
    post:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Cancel registration
      description: Requires `PROGRAM_MANAGE`; applies late-cancel policy and optional waitlist promotion.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: sessionId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: registrationId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Cancellation outcome }

  /program-sessions/{sessionId}/registrations/{registrationId}/no-show:
    post:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Mark registration as no-show
      description: Requires `PROGRAM_MANAGE`; deducts credits and may promote waitlist.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: sessionId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: registrationId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: No-show recorded }

  /program-sessions/{sessionId}/waitlist/{entryId}/confirm:
    post:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Confirm pending waitlist promotion
      description: Requires `PROGRAM_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: sessionId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: entryId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Promotion confirmed }
        '409': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Conflict' }

  /participants/{participantId}/credits:
    get:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Get participant credit ledger
      description: Requires `PROGRAM_MANAGE`.
      parameters:
        - name: participantId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Credit ledger payload or null }

  /participants/{participantId}/credits/adjustments:
    post:
      tags: [Programs]
      summary: Apply credit adjustment
      description: Requires `PROGRAM_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: participantId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Adjustment created }

  /inbox/messages:
    get:
      tags: [Inbox]
      summary: List inbox messages for authenticated user
      description: Requires authenticated session; results are recipient-scoped.
      parameters:
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 50 }
        - name: filter[unread]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, enum: ['true', 'false'] }
        - name: filter[type]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Message list }

  /inbox/messages/{messageId}/read:
    post:
      tags: [Inbox]
      summary: Mark inbox message as read
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: messageId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Read timestamp updated }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /inbox/messages/{messageId}/print:
    post:
      tags: [Inbox]
      summary: Retrieve printable payload for message
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: messageId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Printable payload }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /jobs:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Create job draft
      description: Requires `JOB_EDIT` (Administrator, Employer).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Draft created }

  /jobs/{jobId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Edit job draft content
      description: Requires `JOB_EDIT` plus employer ownership for non-admin users.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Job updated }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }
        '409': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Conflict' }

  /jobs/{jobId}/submit:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Submit job for approval
      description: Requires `JOB_EDIT` plus employer ownership for non-admin users.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Job moved to pending approval }

  /jobs/{jobId}/approve:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Approve job and publish
      description: Requires `JOB_APPROVE` and step-up action `JOB_APPROVE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
          StepUpHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      requestBody:
        content:
          application/json:
            example:
              comment: Approved in workflow
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Approved
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  jobId: 65f0f7d1d5f5f8612f06d001
                  state: PUBLISHED

  /jobs/{jobId}/reject:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Reject job back to draft
      description: Requires `JOB_APPROVE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Rejected }

  /jobs/{jobId}/takedown:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Takedown published job
      description: Requires `JOB_APPROVE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Takedown recorded }

  /jobs/{jobId}/appeals:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Submit appeal for takedown
      description: Requires `JOB_EDIT` plus employer ownership for non-admin users.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '201': { description: Appeal created }

  /jobs/{jobId}/appeals/{appealId}/decide:
    post:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Decide appeal
      description: Requires `JOB_APPROVE` and step-up action `JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
          StepUpHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: appealId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            example:
              decision: APPROVE
              comment: Reinstated after review
      responses:
        '200': { description: Appeal decision recorded }

  /jobs/{jobId}/history:
    get:
      tags: [Jobs]
      summary: Job version/workflow history
      description: Requires `JOB_READ`; non-admin employers are owner-scoped.
      parameters:
        - name: jobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Job history payload }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }

  /analytics/metrics:
    post:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Create metric definition
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_METRIC_MANAGE` (Administrator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Metric created }

  /analytics/dimensions:
    post:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Create dimension definition
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_DIMENSION_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Dimension created }

  /analytics/anomaly-rules:
    post:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Create anomaly rule
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_METRIC_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Rule created }

  /analytics/dashboards:
    post:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Create dashboard definition
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_DASHBOARD_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Dashboard created }

  /analytics/dashboards/{dashboardId}:
    get:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Get dashboard values and anomaly evaluations
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_DASHBOARD_READ`.
      parameters:
        - name: dashboardId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Dashboard payload }

  /analytics/reports:
    post:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Create report definition
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_REPORT_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Report definition created }

  /analytics/reports/{reportId}/run:
    post:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: Trigger report run immediately
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_REPORT_MANAGE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - name: reportId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Report run result }
        '500':
          description: Run failed
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }

  /analytics/reports/{reportId}/runs:
    get:
      tags: [Analytics]
      summary: List report runs
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_REPORT_READ` (Administrator, Auditor).
      parameters:
        - name: reportId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Report runs list }

  /exports:
    post:
      tags: [Exports]
      summary: Queue export job
      description: Requires `EXPORT_CREATE` and step-up action `EXPORT_CREATE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
          StepUpHeader: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            example:
              resource: participants
              format: CSV
              filters: {}
              fields: [name, phone, email, notes]
      responses:
        '202':
          description: Job queued
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  exportJobId: exp_9fd3a8e2
                  status: QUEUED

  /exports/{exportJobId}:
    get:
      tags: [Exports]
      summary: Export job status/details
      description: |
        Requires `EXPORT_READ` and object-level authorization.
        Only requester or Administrator can access the job.
      parameters:
        - name: exportJobId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Export job details }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /admin/config:
    get:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Read runtime config summary
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_REPORT_MANAGE`.
      responses:
        '200': { description: Config summary }
    patch:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Update runtime config (not implemented)
      description: Requires `ANALYTICS_REPORT_MANAGE` and step-up action `ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
          StepUpHeader: []
      responses:
        '501':
          description: Not implemented
          content:
            application/json:
              schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }

  /admin/cache/invalidate:
    post:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Invalidate cache scopes
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '200': { description: Invalidation result }

  /admin/reconciliation/artifacts:
    get:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: List report/export artifacts and checksums
      description: Requires `RECONCILIATION_READ`.
      responses:
        '200': { description: Artifact list }

  /audit/events:
    get:
      tags: [Audit]
      summary: Query immutable audit events
      description: Requires `AUDIT_READ` (Administrator, Auditor).
      parameters:
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1 }
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 50 }
        - name: filter[action]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[actorId]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[entityType]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[from]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, format: date-time }
        - name: filter[to]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, format: date-time }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Event list (metadata sanitized) }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

components:
  securitySchemes:
    SessionCookie:
      type: apiKey
      in: cookie
      name: museum_sid
      description: Session cookie set by `POST /auth/login`.
    CsrfHeader:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-CSRF-Token
      description: Required on mutating requests except `POST /auth/login`.
    StepUpHeader:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Step-Up-Token
      description: One-time action-bound step-up token for sensitive operations.
  parameters:
    UserId:
      name: userId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    DraftId:
      name: draftId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
  schemas:
    Role:
      type: string
      enum:
        - Administrator
        - Curator
        - Exhibit Manager
        - Program Coordinator
        - Employer
        - Reviewer
        - Auditor
    LoginResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: object
          properties:
            user:
              type: object
              properties:
                id: { type: string }
                username: { type: string }
                roles:
                  type: array
                  items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Role' }
            session:
              type: object
              properties:
                id: { type: string }
                idleExpiresAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
            csrfToken: { type: string }
    ErrorEnvelope:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message, requestId]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              oneOf:
                - type: array
                  items: { type: object }
                - type: object
            requestId: { type: string }
  responses:
    ValidationError:
      description: Validation failed
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    AuthError:
      description: Invalid credentials or account lock
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    Unauthenticated:
      description: Authentication required or session expired
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient role permission or object-level access denied
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    Conflict:
      description: State conflict
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    GraphValidationBlocked:
      description: Blocking graph validation issues remain
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
diffs.after:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Philatelic Museum Operations Suite API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: |
    Public HTTP API for museum operations.

    Authentication model:
    - Session cookie `museum_sid` (set on `POST /auth/login`)
    - `X-CSRF-Token` required on mutating requests (`POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE`) except `POST /auth/login`
    - `X-Step-Up-Token` required on sensitive actions after `POST /auth/step-up`

    Step-up actions:
    - `GRAPH_PUBLISH`
    - `ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE`
    - `JOB_APPROVE`
    - `JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE`
    - `EXPORT_CREATE`
    - `ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE`
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:8080/api/v1
tags:
  - name: Health
  - name: Auth
  - name: Users
  - name: Catalog
  - name: Graph
  - name: Venues & Routes
  - name: Programs
  - name: Inbox
  - name: Jobs
  - name: Analytics
  - name: Exports
  - name: Admin
  - name: Audit
security:
  - SessionCookie: []
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Service and database health
      security: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Health payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: object
              example:
                data:
                  status: ok
                  service: backend
                  sessionCookie:
                    name: museum_sid
                    httpOnly: true
                    secure: false
                    sameSite: strict
                    idleTtlSeconds: 1800
                    absoluteTtlSeconds: 43200
                  db:
                    ready: true
                    connected: true
                    readyState: 1
                    lastError: null

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Login and create authenticated session
      description: Bootstrap endpoint exempt from CSRF header requirement.
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [username, password]
              properties:
                username: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
            example:
              username: curator.dev
              password: CuratorSecure!2026
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Authenticated
          headers:
            Set-Cookie:
              schema:
                type: string
              description: Session cookie `museum_sid`
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginResponse'
              example:
                data:
                  user:
                    id: 65f0f7d1d5f5f8612f06a001
                    username: curator.dev
                    roles: [Curator]
                  session:
                    id: x9pR2lD_session
                    idleExpiresAt: '2026-03-30T10:00:00.000Z'
                  csrfToken: a7815c8d-2f15-42f1-b8a9-a4ef880d3123
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/AuthError'

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Logout and destroy session
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '204': { description: Logged out }

  /auth/me:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Current session principal and session metadata
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Current principal
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthenticated'

  /auth/step-up:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Verify credentials and issue one-time action-bound step-up token
      description: Requires authenticated session and CSRF token.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [password, action]
              properties:
                password: { type: string }
                action:
                  type: string
                  enum: [GRAPH_PUBLISH, ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE, JOB_APPROVE, JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE, EXPORT_CREATE, ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Step-up token issued
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  stepUpToken: stp_2fbf4e9f2e5a4d8faea6
                  action: GRAPH_PUBLISH
                  validUntil: '2026-03-30T10:10:00.000Z'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/AuthError'

  /users:
    get:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: List users (excluding password hashes)
      description: Requires permission `USERS_ADMIN` (Administrator).
      responses:
        '200': { description: User list }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }
    post:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Create user
      description: Requires permission `USERS_ADMIN` (Administrator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [username, password, roles]
              properties:
                username: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
                roles:
                  type: array
                  items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Role' }
      responses:
        '201': { description: User created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }
        '409': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Conflict' }

  /users/{userId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Users]
      summary: Update user roles/status
      description: Requires permission `USERS_ADMIN` (Administrator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      parameters:
        - $ref: '#/components/parameters/UserId'
      responses:
        '200': { description: User updated }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }
        '404': { $ref: '#/components/responses/NotFound' }

  /catalog/search:
    get:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Catalog search
      description: Publicly accessible search with caching and fuzzy relevance.
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: page
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, default: 1 }
        - name: pageSize
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 50, default: 20 }
        - name: sort
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
            enum: [relevance:desc, title:asc, period:asc]
        - name: filter[category]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[tags]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[periodId]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[seriesId]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Search results
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  - id: 65f0f7d1d5f5f8612f06b111
                    title: Blue Airmail
                    catalogNumber: CAT-123
                    artist: I. Kline
                    series: Airmail
                    country: USA
                    period: 1930s
                    tags: [airmail, blue]
                pagination:
                  page: 1
                  pageSize: 20
                  total: 1
                  totalPages: 1
                meta:
                  cache: MISS
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /catalog/autocomplete:
    get:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Autocomplete suggestions
      security: []
      parameters:
        - name: q
          in: query
          required: true
          schema: { type: string, minLength: 1, maxLength: 64 }
        - name: limit
          in: query
          schema: { type: integer, minimum: 1, maximum: 15, default: 8 }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Suggestions }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

  /catalog/hot-keywords:
    get:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Active curated hot keywords
      security: []
      responses:
        '200': { description: Keywords }
    post:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Create hot keyword
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION` (Administrator, Curator).
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '201': { description: Created }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }
        '403': { $ref: '#/components/responses/Forbidden' }

  /catalog/hot-keywords/{keywordId}:
    patch:
      tags: [Catalog]
      summary: Update hot keyword
      description: Requires `CATALOG_CURATION`.
      security:

          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[actorId]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[entityType]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string }
        - name: filter[from]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, format: date-time }
        - name: filter[to]
          in: query
          schema: { type: string, format: date-time }
      responses:
        '200': { description: Event list (metadata sanitized) }
        '400': { $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError' }

components:
  securitySchemes:
    SessionCookie:
      type: apiKey
      in: cookie
      name: museum_sid
      description: Session cookie set by `POST /auth/login`.
    CsrfHeader:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-CSRF-Token
      description: Required on mutating requests except `POST /auth/login`.
    StepUpHeader:
      type: apiKey
      in: header
      name: X-Step-Up-Token
      description: One-time action-bound step-up token for sensitive operations.
  parameters:
    UserId:
      name: userId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
    DraftId:
      name: draftId
      in: path
      required: true
      schema: { type: string }
  schemas:
    Role:
      type: string
      enum:
        - Administrator
        - Curator
        - Exhibit Manager
        - Program Coordinator
        - Employer
        - Reviewer
        - Auditor
    LoginResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        data:
          type: object
          properties:
            user:
              type: object
              properties:
                id: { type: string }
                username: { type: string }
                roles:
                  type: array
                  items: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/Role' }
            session:
              type: object
              properties:
                id: { type: string }
                idleExpiresAt: { type: string, format: date-time }
            csrfToken: { type: string }
    ErrorEnvelope:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: object
          required: [code, message, requestId]
          properties:
            code: { type: string }
            message: { type: string }
            details:
              oneOf:
                - type: array
                  items: { type: object }
                - type: object
            requestId: { type: string }
  responses:
    ValidationError:
      description: Validation failed
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    AuthError:
      description: Invalid credentials or account lock
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    Unauthenticated:
      description: Authentication required or session expired
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient role permission or object-level access denied
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    Conflict:
      description: State conflict
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }
    GraphValidationBlocked:
      description: Blocking graph validation issues remain
      content:
        application/json:
          schema: { $ref: '#/components/schemas/ErrorEnvelope' }

parts.text:
You are a senior full-stack engineer working in an existing repository. 
Your goal is to remediate acceptance gaps so the project passes Delivery Acceptance.
Context:
Current status is Partial Pass due to:
1) Catalog pagination contract mismatch: expected max pageSize is 50, but implementation currently allows 51.
2) Frontend has demo-like UX (console/JSON-dump style panels and scripted one-click flows) that feels less production-ready than backend capabilities.
Task:
Update the existing codebase (do not rewrite from scratch) to meet the following strict acceptance criteria.
A) Fix the pagination contract mismatch everywhere
- Enforce catalog pageSize max = 50 (not 51) consistently across:
  - backend validation and API handlers
  - frontend form validation/clamping and UI hints
  - shared constants/docs/examples
  - API tests, unit tests, component/integration tests, and E2E assertions
- Boundary behavior required:
  - pageSize=50 -> accepted
  - pageSize=51 -> validation error with clear message
- Remove all stale references to 51 from code and docs.
B) Productize frontend UX (remove demo feel)
- Replace console-style/raw JSON dump panels used as primary UX with structured UI:
  - cards, tables, labeled fields, status badges, summaries
  - meaningful empty/loading/error/success states
  - inline validation feedback
- Break scripted “do everything” actions into explicit user-driven flows:
  - analytics setup and report run should be step-based and editable
  - exports should show clear request form, job status, and artifact list
  - audit/inbox/ops details should be presented in readable tables with filtering/sorting where applicable
- Keep existing business rules and role-based access behavior intact.
- Preserve offline-ready behavior and queue/sync behavior.
C) Keep security and permissions intact
- Do not weaken auth, RBAC, step-up confirmation, or sensitive-action protections.
- Ensure route guards and forbidden states still work for direct hash/url tab access.
- Avoid exposing sensitive values in UI/logs.
D) Testing and verification (must be updated)
- Add/adjust tests proving the pagination boundary contract:
  - unit + API/integration + at least one UI/E2E assertion for 50 pass / 51 fail
- Add/adjust frontend tests for improved UX flows (no JSON-dump-only dependency in critical paths).
- Ensure existing tests still pass.
E) Documentation updates
- Update README and any API/frontend docs so they reflect pageSize max 50.
- Add a short “Acceptance remediation” note listing what changed and why.
Execution constraints:
- Modify only what is necessary and keep architecture clean.
- No Docker commands.
- Keep code maintainable and aligned with existing patterns.
Final output format:
1) What was changed (by file/path)
2) Why these changes fix each acceptance blocker
3) Test commands run and concise results
4) Any remaining risks or follow-ups (if none, say none)

37: const levenshteinDistance = (left, right) => {
38:   const a = normalizeText(left);
39:   const b = normalizeText(right);
40: 
41:   if (!a) return b.length;
42:   if (!b) return a.length;
43:   if (a === b) return 0;
44: 
45:   const matrix = Array.from({ length: a.length + 1 }, () => new Array(b.length + 1).fill(0));
46:   for (let i = 0; i <= a.length; i += 1) matrix[i][0] = i;
47:   for (let j = 0; j <= b.length; j += 1) matrix[0][j] = j;
48: 
49:   for (let i = 1; i <= a.length; i += 1) {
50:     for (let j = 1; j <= b.length; j += 1) {
51:       const cost = a[i - 1] === b[j - 1] ? 0 : 1;
52:       matrix[i][j] = Math.min(
53:         matrix[i - 1][j] + 1,
54:         matrix[i][j - 1] + 1,
55:         matrix[i - 1][j - 1] + cost
56:       );
57:     }
58:   }
59: 
60:   return matrix[a.length][b.length];
61: };

142: const compareBySort = (left, right, sort) => {

145:   }

152: const scoreCatalogItem = (queryText, item) => {
153:   const query = normalizeText(queryText);
154:   if (!query) {
155:     return 0;
156:   }
157: 
158:   const fields = [
159:     { value: item.catalog_number, weight: 1.1 },
160:     { value: item.title, weight: 1 },
161:     { value: item.artist, weight: 0.95 },
162:     { value: item.series, weight: 0.9 },
163:     { value: item.country, weight: 0.8 },
164:     { value: item.period, weight: 0.8 },
165:     { value: Array.isArray(item.tags) ? item.tags.join(' ') : '', weight: 0.75 }
166:   ];
167: 
168:   let bestScore = 0;
169:   for (const field of fields) {
170:     const normalized = normalizeText(field.value);
171:     if (!normalized) {
172:       continue;
173:     }
174: 
175:     let score = 0;
176:     if (normalized === query) {
177:       score = 100;
178:     } else if (normalized.startsWith(query)) {
179:       score = 94;
180:     } else if (normalized.includes(query)) {
181:       score = 86;
182:     } else {

184:       const maxLen = Math.max(query.length, normalized.length);
185:       const tolerance = Math.max(1, Math.floor(maxLen * 0.25));
186:       if (distance <= tolerance) {

198:     }

200:     bestScore = Math.max(bestScore, score * field.weight);
201:   }

25:     return;
26:   }
27: 
28:   const periodKey = metricResult?.period?.currentWeekStart || new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
29:   const recipients = new Set([String(dashboard.created_by)]);
30: 
31:   const privileged = await User.find({ roles: { $in: ['Administrator', 'Auditor'] }, status: 'ACTIVE' }, { _id: 1 }).lean();
32:   for (const user of privileged) {
33:     recipients.add(String(user._id));
34:   }
35: 
36:   for (const recipientId of recipients) {
37:     const dedupeKey = `${dashboard.dashboard_id}:${rule.rule_key}:${periodKey}:${recipientId}`;
38: 
39:     try {
40:       await AnomalyDispatch.create({
41:         dedupe_key: dedupeKey,

44:         period_key: String(periodKey),
45:         recipient_id: recipientId,
46:         message_id: null
47:       });

54:         payload: {
55:           dashboardId: dashboard.dashboard_id,
56:           rule: rule.rule_key,
57:           metricKey: rule.metric_key,
58:           periodKey,
59:           printable: {
60:             noticeType: 'ANOMALY_ALERT',
61:             rule: rule.rule_key,

63:             periodKey
64:           }
65:         }
66:       });
67: 
68:       await AnomalyDispatch.updateOne({ dedupe_key: dedupeKey }, {
69:         $set: {
70:         message_id: message._id
71:         }
72:       });
73:     } catch (error) {
74:       if (error.code !== 11000) {
75:         throw error;
76:       }
77:     }
78:   }
79: };

48:     ReportRun.find({ status: 'SUCCESS' }).sort({ started_at: -1 }).limit(100).lean(),

files.before:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Philatelic Museum Operations Suite API
  version: 1.0.0
  description: |
    Public HTTP API for museum operations.

    Authentication model:
    - Session cookie `museum_sid` (set on `POST /auth/login`)
    - `X-CSRF-Token` required on mutating requests (`POST|PUT|PATCH|DELETE`) except `POST /auth/login`
    - `X-Step-Up-Token` required on sensitive actions after `POST /auth/step-up`

    Step-up actions:
    - `GRAPH_PUBLISH`
    - `ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE`
    - `JOB_APPROVE`
    - `JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE`
    - `EXPORT_CREATE`
    - `ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE`
servers:
  - url: http://localhost:8080/api/v1
tags:
  - name: Health
  - name: Auth
  - name: Users
  - name: Catalog
  - name: Graph
  - name: Venues & Routes
  - name: Programs
  - name: Inbox
  - name: Jobs
  - name: Analytics
  - name: Exports
  - name: Admin
  - name: Audit
security:
  - SessionCookie: []
paths:
  /health:
    get:
      tags: [Health]
      summary: Service and database health
      security: []
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Health payload
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties:
                  data:
                    type: object
              example:
                data:
                  status: ok
                  service: backend
                  sessionCookie:
                    name: museum_sid
                    httpOnly: true
                    secure: false
                    sameSite: strict
                    idleTtlSeconds: 1800
                    absoluteTtlSeconds: 43200
                  db:
                    ready: true
                    connected: true
                    readyState: 1
                    lastError: null

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Login and create authenticated session
      description: Bootstrap endpoint exempt from CSRF header requirement.
      security: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [username, password]
              properties:
                username: { type: string }
                password: { type: string }
            example:
              username: curator.dev
              password: CuratorSecure!2026
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Authenticated
          headers:
            Set-Cookie:
              schema:
                type: string
              description: Session cookie `museum_sid`
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/LoginResponse'
              example:
                data:
                  user:
                    id: 65f0f7d1d5f5f8612f06a001
                    username: curator.dev
                    roles: [Curator]
                  session:
                    id: x9pR2lD_session
                    idleExpiresAt: '2026-03-30T10:00:00.000Z'
                  csrfToken: a7815c8d-2f15-42f1-b8a9-a4ef880d3123
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/AuthError'

  /auth/logout:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Logout and destroy session
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      responses:
        '204': { description: Logged out }

  /auth/me:
    get:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Current session principal and session metadata
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Current principal
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/Unauthenticated'

  /auth/step-up:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Verify credentials and issue one-time action-bound step-up token
      description: Requires authenticated session and CSRF token.
      security:
        - SessionCookie: []
          CsrfHeader: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              type: object
              required: [password, action]
              properties:
                password: { type: string }
                action:
                  type: string
                  enum: [GRAPH_PUBLISH, ROUTE_RULE_CHANGE, JOB_APPROVE, JOB_APPEAL_DECIDE, EXPORT_CREATE, ADMIN_CONFIG_UPDATE]
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Step-up token issued
          content:
            application/json:
              example:
                data:
                  stepUpToken: stp_2fbf4e9f2e5a4d8faea6
                  action: GRAPH_PUBLISH
                  validUntil: '2026-03-30T10:10:00.000Z'
        '400':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/ValidationError'
        '401':
          $ref: '#/components/responses/AuthError'

                    series: Airmail
                    country: USA
                    period: 1930s
